settings.heading: We Make Packaging That Honors the Planet and Its People.

settings.text: Every KOA product is designed with intention, handcrafted by women, and rooted in zero-waste processes. From sourcing to stitching, we think about the impact — so you don’t have to.

settings.title: Climate
settings.text: We use biodegradable fabrics like cotton, jute, and eco-dyed satin.

settings.title: Culture
settings.text: Every KOA bag is made by a woman artisan earning fair pay and dignified work.

settings.title: Consiousness
settings.text: Maximizing every inch and minimizing waste to keep our carbon footprint light.

settings.intro: We're grounded in purpose—crafting a future where sustainability is second nature. From empowering women artisans to reimagining waste as a resource, every KOA Pack is a small act of conscious change—for your brand and the planet.
settings.headline:
Most Packaging Ends
Up as Waste. Ours Doesn’t.
settings.subcopy: At KOA, we design packaging to be kept, not discarded. We use natural fabrics, repurpose offcuts, and avoid synthetics—because nothing beautiful should go to waste.

settings.description: We believe sustainability isn't just a section—it’s embedded in every layer of what we do. From our people to our processes and packaging, here’s how we’re turning purpose into practice—no greenwashing, no jargon.

settings.text: “Every Inch Counts” We maximize every inch of fabric and minimize waste, ensuring a lighter footprint — one thoughtful cut at a time.
We work with biodegradable fabrics like cotton, jute, and eco-dyed satin — rooted in the earth and made to return to it.

settings.heading: Recognized by Green India Collective
settings.body: KOA Packs was honored for our contributions to sustainable employment and zero-waste packaging innovation.

settings.heading: Named a Top 10 Women-Led Impact Brand of 2025
settings.body: We’re proud to be featured in Impact Leaders India for our continued focus on ethical production and female empowerment.

settings.heading: KOA x Neem Foundation: Packaging for Purpose
settings.body: We partnered with Neem Foundation to launch eco-packs for their handmade wellness kits — with proceeds funding local school supplies.

settings.section_description: These moments remind us that thoughtful packaging and empowered people can shape something much larger — a better way forward.

settings.heading: Try Before You Commit.
settings.subheading: Whether you’re ready to start your order or just want to explore ideas, drop us a line. We’re here to help.
